property: no reachable failure path outside the construction repository
reason: This check's whole body gates on _is_construction_repo(), which now reads the shared origin==home signal (repo_identity.is_home_repo) — it guards the home repo's own committed memory-backup pointer. In a deployed copy (git origin differs from the recorded home_repository) the gate reads False and the check returns before any failure path, so the fixture structurally cannot bite there. In the home repository this declaration is inert and the bite stays required. Whether this protection should ALSO run in deployed repos is a scoping question surfaced on issue #512 — widening it is a check change, not a fixture change.
